name: io.github.mlava/agent-ready-mcp
title: Agent Ready
description: Scan any URL for AI agent readability — Vercel Spec, llmstxt.org, and agent-protocol manifests.

environmentVariables.description: Agent Ready Pro API key for scan_site and get_scan. ask and validate_structured_data work without one. Issue a key at https://agent-ready.dev/dashboard/api-keys.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_READY_API_KEY
